model_shift.pvalue_interpretation: Both structural shift and predictive degradation are present. This combination deserves the strongest governance posture.

cate_portfolio_status.warning: CATE portfolio blocked because the causal policy did not pass overlap/sensitivity/policy gates.

business_meaning.pd_internal_selected_threshold: Threshold interno de screening/seleccion PD usado en busqueda y analisis tecnico.
business_meaning.pd_internal_fallback_threshold: Fallback interno tomado de la policy de fairness durante la busqueda de threshold PD.
business_meaning.fairness_primary_threshold: Threshold operativo principal para auditoria de fairness y narrativa de aprobacion.
business_meaning.decision_policy_global_threshold: Threshold operativo global aplicado por la policy de decision/aprobacion.

time_series_status.interval_selector_reason: interval champion selected from eligible families under the governed coverage-gap policy; adaptive and conformal statistical candidates remain diagnostic unless they satisfy the same thresholds.

adaptive_method_status.notes: Adaptive methods remain diagnostic until they beat the official interval policy.

final_interval_decision.reason: interval champion selected from eligible families under the governed coverage-gap policy; adaptive and conformal statistical candidates remain diagnostic unless they satisfy the same thresholds.

business_meaning.pd_internal_selected_threshold: Threshold interno de screening/seleccion PD usado en busqueda y analisis tecnico.
business_meaning.pd_internal_fallback_threshold: Fallback interno tomado de la policy de fairness durante la busqueda de threshold PD.
business_meaning.fairness_primary_threshold: Threshold operativo principal para auditoria de fairness y narrativa de aprobacion.
business_meaning.decision_policy_global_threshold: Threshold operativo global aplicado por la policy de decision/aprobacion.

notes: Snapshot con métricas para storytelling reproducible.
Threshold PD interno y threshold operativo de fairness se reportan por separado.
Classification sets y rare-event calibration son sidecars diagnósticos; no forman parte del champion operativo actual.
